song.title: Never Did I Dream Before
song.lyrics:
[V1] .A D Never did I dream before, . A Such a place could e’er be found, . D Where the tears of sorrow cease, . A Songs of endless joy abound. . D A Bm One who seldom ever sang, . E Now delights his voice to raise; . D A Bm Singing hymns with all the saints, . E A Echoing the ceaseless praise.
[V2] Day by day the world goes on, Just as it has gone before. Millions grasp and clutch at life, Wond’ring if there could be more; Such was I and would be, yet Mercy found me out somehow; With what gratefulness I say, “I’m in God’s own family now.”
[V3] How delightful ‘tis to know; How subjective, real, and sweet Is the inward joy of grace We exper'ence when we meet; Life abundant Jesus gives As my full reality; Praise You, Lord, it’s really true, I’m in Your own family. .. .. .. .. --- [V4] At the closing of this age, Just before Your kingdom’s dawn, May You gain a people, Lord, For Your dwelling place, Your home. Since for me You gave Your all, Everything I lay aside; For Your church my all I’d give, That You would be satisfied.
